title: Run Pinake interface accessibility keyboard and theme QA
description:
Run dedicated accessibility and interface QA for the native Pinake VS Code experience.

This complements the existing accessibility and large-tree performance task by focusing specifically on UX/UI behavior, keyboard operation, screen-reader-friendly metadata where supported, and visual design checks across Light, Dark, and High Contrast themes.

checklist.text: Verify keyboard-only operation for tree actions, context menus, QuickPick flows, and InputBox prompts.
Check accessible labels, descriptions, and tooltips where VS Code APIs expose metadata.
Inspect Light, Dark, and High Contrast theme behavior for visual clarity and contrast.
Verify the interface remains usable with long paths, long document titles, many folders, and many favorites.
Record QA results and file follow-up tasks for any concrete defects found.
